name: Blau Farmaceutica S.A.
summary: Blau Farmac√É¬™utica S.A., a pharmaceutical company, engages in the production and sale of biological medications in the United States, Colombia, Chile, Peru, Argentina, Uruguay, and Brazil. Its medications cover various therapeutic classes, such as oncology, hematology, nephrology, rheumatology, infectology, anesthesiology, intensive care, general practice, and others. The company was founded in 1987 and is based in Cotia, Brazil.
